purpose: DebugTunnel recipe-selection QA cases for known-good native macOS Lego families.

cases.goal: Build a native macOS Wordle-style five-letter word guessing game with a letter grid, on-screen keyboard, physical keyboard input, offline word list, score/status feedback, and launch smoke-test stdout.
Yes, build it now. Output the COMPLETE macOS app in a ```macosapp JSON block with no placeholders.

cases.goal: Build a native macOS NYT Mini Crossword clone with a 5x5 grid, across/down clues, keyboard entry, selection highlighting, timer, and solved feedback.
Build a native macOS Mastermind code breaker clone with color guesses, feedback pegs, turn tracking, score, and compact polished controls.
Build a native macOS Minesweeper 99 clone with mine placement, flags, reveal logic, flood reveal, timer, score, and polished grid controls.
Build a native macOS Candy Match clone with tile swapping, match-three cascades, score, combo labels, and a colorful grid.
Build a native macOS Asteroids clone with vector ship rotation, thrust, bullets, asteroid splitting, score, lives, and persistent best score.
Build a native macOS Alien Abduction top-down arcade clone with alien ship movement, beams, projectiles, score, waves, and arcade HUD.
Build a native macOS Pong clone with paddles, ball physics, score to 7, keyboard controls, sound effects, and polished HUD.

recentUserMessages: Build a polished native macOS Pong Clone using the Native macOS Lego components. It should have paddles, ball physics, score to 7, keyboard controls, reset/pause controls, a crisp arcade HUD, and launch smoke-test stdout. Mandatory: copy selected macOS components verbatim, include mchatai-macos-components-used.json for recipe.arcade-pong, and keep rendering/input glue separate from copied engine files.

cases.goal: Build a native macOS Atari Adventure clone with castle rooms, keys, treasure, enemies, maze movement, inventory/status, and win condition.
Build a native macOS Frogger clone where I cross the road, dodge cars, ride logs, use grid movement, track lives, and reach safe zones.
Build a native macOS PacMan clone with maze movement, ghosts, pellets, powerups, score, lives, and keyboard controls.
Build a native macOS Mario-style plumber platformer clone with jumping, platforms, enemies, coins, camera follow, score, and lives.
Build a native macOS Pyramid Hopper platformer clone with jumping, platforms, hazards, score, collectibles, and camera follow.
Build a native macOS Tower Defense clone with enemy waves, path followers, turrets, projectiles, lives, credits, and score.
Build a native macOS BlackJack clone with deck, cards, dealer logic, hit, stand, betting chips, bankroll, and settlement.
Build a native macOS Texas Holdem Poker clone with deck, hole cards, flop, turn, river, betting rounds, hand evaluator, and table HUD.
Build a native macOS Checkers clone with an 8x8 board, legal moves, captures, king me, turns, and a mono visual style.
Build a native macOS playable Chess clone with an 8x8 board, king, queen, bishop, rook, knight, legal moves, check, and checkmate.
Build a native macOS Piano mini-app clone with playable keyboard notes, note frequencies, visual key feedback, and simple synth controls.
